member.name: T:MiniCMS.Web.Controllers.Api.ArticlesController
member.summary: Article management endpoints for the MiniCMS REST API.
member.remarks: COMP 4602 Assignment 1: CRUD operations for articles. HTML content is sanitized server-side to reduce script injection risk.

member.name: M:MiniCMS.Web.Controllers.Api.ArticlesController.GetAll
member.remarks: Returns article list items (ID, title, and timestamps). No pagination/search in Assignment 1.

member.name: M:MiniCMS.Web.Controllers.Api.ArticlesController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a single article by ID.
member.returns: The article details if found; otherwise 404.

member.name: M:MiniCMS.Web.Controllers.Api.ArticlesController.Create(MiniCMS.Web.Dtos.ArticleCreateDto)
member.remarks: The server sanitizes HTML content before storing it.
member.param: Title and content for the new article.

member.name: M:MiniCMS.Web.Controllers.Api.ArticlesController.Update(System.Int32,MiniCMS.Web.Dtos.ArticleUpdateDto)
member.remarks: The server sanitizes HTML content before saving updates.
member.returns: 204 if updated; 404 if not found; 400 if invalid.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
